basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Associate I (RA-I) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 26-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD candidates will be as per the Government of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. or equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering, or having 3 years of research, teaching, and design and development experience after M.E./M.Tech. with at least one research paper in a Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal.
qualification.details: Ph.D. or equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering, or having 3 years of research, teaching, and design and development experience after M.E./M.Tech. with at least one research paper in a Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Silchar Research Associate I (RA-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Silchar Research Associate I (RA-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Silchar Research Associate I (RA-I) position is 26th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate I (RA-I) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. or equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering, or have 3 years of relevant experience after M.E./M.Tech. with a published SCI journal paper.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate I (RA-I) post is 35 years, with relaxations applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate I (RA-I) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 58,000 per month, plus HRA as per guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Silchar Research Associate I (RA-I) vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the email is sent before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate I (RA-I) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITS/Dean(R&C)/ECE/704/02/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this job?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
